title: [App] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Standalone headset (Voyager Legend 50/30) without Charge Case shows only headset battery indicator and headset info in Settings > Software Update
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Voyager Legend 50 or Poly Voyager Legend 30 headset is NOT paired with a Charge Case.
2. Power on the headset and put it into pairing mode.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
4. Navigate to the Home screen and confirm the device is connected.
5. Observe the battery indicator displayed on the Home screen.
6. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
8. Observe the information displayed under Software Update.
expected: Only the headset battery indicator is shown on the Home screen (no charge case battery indicator). In Settings > Software Update, only headset information (e.g., headset firmware version, serial number) is displayed, with no charge case information present.
